description: A generic blockquote wrapper that applies blockquote styling to arbitrary rich-text content.

stories.name: Default
stories.description: Blockquote with a quote and author attribution

props.children:
It's very exciting to be able to use our findings, through research, to further/better inform not only our own teaching practice and learning journey, but also to have a positive impact on our work environment, and ultimately our students.

Matt Green
iPGCE Student

stories.name: SingleParagraph
stories.description: Blockquote with a single paragraph of text

props.children: In 1954, her Majesty the Queen visited the University. Both my husband, Harry, and I sang in the chorus in a masque written by Prof. William Empson. A memorable occasion!
'…herd immunity relies on the assumption that an epidemic is best overcome by leaving it unregulated.'

notes: Pure layout container — accepts arbitrary children. Has no root CSS class; the element itself is the blockquote tag. The selector blockquote:not(.uosquote) distinguishes this from the UosQuote atom which uses class uosquote. Some instances contain nested uosquote elements or divs — content is entirely freeform.
